form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Power Valley at this track last start over 350m (20.43). Right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on numerous occasions in restricted racing room leaving the first turn.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 20.02 as a strongly fancied winner over 350m at this track. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished 3rd over 350m at this track beaten 6 lengths (20.47) behind Power Valley in a Mix on April 5. Around the mark recently. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (20.59) at big odds over 350m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Mix on April 7 over 450m at this track behind Love By Design, beaten 12 lengths (25.98). Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after claiming her maiden success on March 6 at Q Lakeside over 390m. Last start was third over 411m in 23.80, behind Jam Fury. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.
